## Player class

CMAF media player. Augments a `<video>` element with adaptive streaming through MSE.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare class Player extends EventEmitter<EventMap> 
```
**Extends:** EventEmitter&lt;[EventMap](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.eventmap)<!-- -->&gt;
